programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: A new take on a traditional snack food; a single-serve all-in-one portable coffee product; a beverage line made from real herbs, fruits and flowers; a patented design that makes taking care of newborns easier.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: A portable outdoor game that combines pickleball and Spikeball; a pet-sitting service for weddings and events; a high-fashion bodysuit; gourmet made-to-order French fries.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: Home viewers have a chance to weigh in on whether the Sharks should take the plunge and make a deal.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: A learning platform to empower students to reach their creative potential through art; an oat-based spread; a boozy spin on a wedding day essential; a fun and edible innovation designed to reduce single-use plastics; guest shark Daniel Lubetzky.
